info.name: AI Financial Decision Support Simulator
info.description:
Comprehensive test suite for the Financial Simulation API.

Endpoint: POST /api/simulate/

Covers: SAFE/TIGHT/RISKY scenarios, loan vs full payment, edge cases, validation errors, goal plans, and all choice field variations.

item.name: TC01 - SAFE: Full Payment, High Savings, Stable Income

exec: pm.test('each insight has title and detail', () => {

item.name: TC08 - With Full Goal Plan (planName, targetAmount, targetDate, description)

exec: // AI should reference the goal in some way

body.raw:
{
  "monthlyIncome": 5000,
  "rent": 800,
  "utilities": 150,
  "subscriptionsInsurance": 50,
  "existingLoans": 0,
  "variableExpenses": 400,
  "currentSavings": 20000,
  "dependents": 1,
  "householdResponsibilityLevel": "half",
  "incomeStability": "very_stable",
  "riskTolerance": "balanced",
  "purchaseAmount": 5000,
  "paymentType": "full",
  "planName": "Emergency Fund",
  "targetAmount": 50000,
  "targetDate": "31/12/2027",
  "goalDescription": "Build a 12-month emergency fund for family security"
}

item.name: TC09 - Goal Plan with Only planName (partial goal)
TC10 - Goal Plan Date in YYYY-MM-DD Format

body.raw:
